title: Assembly of an Endorsement
source_text: 7. Assembly of an Endorsement. Figure 9-2 shows a suggested way to assemble an endorsement for signature and mailing.
plain_language_rule: The manual provides a suggested assembly method for endorsements via Figure 9-2. No prescriptive text-based assembly order is given; the guidance is advisory and refers to the figure for details.
notes: Source text resolved from SECNAV M-5216.5 CH-1, 9-2.7 Assembly of an Endorsement. This is an advisory physical assembly/package procedure. The rule text only references Figure 9-2 for a suggested assembly method; no hard text-based assembly order is prescribed. Not automatable as a validator rule. No renderer impact.
